{{Quote|Care to buy a Sith girl a drink?|Duan to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Duan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Sith officer|officer]] who served [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. In [[3956 BBY]], she was stationed on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]]. During her stay, she was known to be a heavy drinker.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Duan will only have a conversation if [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] is a male. If Revan is a woman, Duan simply tells the female Revan to back-off and leave her alone.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
